recent.author: slackable.dev
recent.snippet: Quick answers, then the code. *1. Force re-verification?* No API for it — you have to re-trigger from the Slack app config page. The "unverified" state is sticky. Two ways: • Go to `<http://api.slack.com/apps|api.slack.com/apps>` → your app → *Event Subscriptions* → flip *Enable

recent.snippet: The *engagement* pillar (11 points total) primarily measures CX team activity and product usage signals. It weighs: • *CX engagement* (Group 1): cs_leading_indicators like Gong calls, SFDC tasks, Skilljar activity — scoped to CS employees only • *Product usage*: visitors, events,

recent.author: Pulse
recent.snippet: *Renewal Proximity* in the Pulse score measures how close an account is to their renewal date. It's worth up to 15 points out of 100. Here's how it works: • >180 days until renewal → 15 points (full) • 90-180 days → 12 points • 60-90 days → 8 points • 30-60 days → 5 points • &
